title: draba alpina var. aspera
intro: Draba alpina var. aspera, also known as Alpine Whitlow Grass or Aspera Whitlow Grass, is a plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which have been used to treat various health issues. The plant has been traditionally used to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Draba alpina var. aspera can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal benefits, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
